# dokku_network (Resource)

Manages a Dokku attachable docker network (`dokku network:create`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the docker network.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
